case_title: QIU TIAN LI VS. ANH TRONG HO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF QIU TIAN LI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER VIVIAN CHOI (FRIEND). DEFENDANT ANH TRONG HO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE COURT INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT. CHI HO APPEARS AS WITNESS (DAUGHTER) FOR DEFENDANT. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO ALLOW THEIR CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, QIU TIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG $4,120.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,185.00, DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY IS INCONSISTENT WITH VEHICLE DAMAGE THAT SUPPORTS FINDING THAT HE LEFT THE MIDDLE LANE AND MADE IMPACT TO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE IN THE FURTHEST RIGHT LANE NORTH ON PRESIDIO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, QIU TIAN AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LI, QIU TIAN AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE DATE ON CERT MAIL CARD, DATE OF FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE IS USED AS SERVICE DATE SERVED DEC-06-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY LI, QIU TIAN HO, ANH TRONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2021 - JUDGMENT.
